PAGE_TITLE: Live Commenting System For Any Website or Application - FastComments
HEAD_META_DESCRIPTION: FastComments is a live commenting system and Disqus alternative for static sites, WordPress, and any web application. Frontend and backend SDKs for building commenting and chat features into your existing applications.
HERO_DESCRIPTION: Pick a commenting system that will delight your users and developers. We'll provide the features you care about without spying on you.
SECTION_INSTALL_SUBTITLE: No account needed to try it. If you can edit your site, you can add FastComments.
INSTALL_STEP_COPY_DESC: Pick your platform - plain HTML, React, Vue, Angular, and more - then copy the snippet.
INSTALL_STEP_PASTE_DESC: Drop it wherever you want comments to appear. No build step, no backend changes.
INSTALL_STEP_DONE_DESC: Comments are live, with realtime updates and moderation built in. Ready to make it yours? A free trial takes about a minute.
SNIPPET_HEADING: Get Commenting Code For Your Site
SECTION_LIVE_DEMO_SUBTITLE: This is the real widget, running live on this page. You're already signed in as a temporary demo user, so go ahead and leave a comment.
SECTION_LIVE_DEMO_HINT: Open this page in a second tab and watch your comment appear there instantly.
SECTION_KEY_FEATURES_SUBTITLE: A complete commenting system with live conversations, SSO, spam protection, and deep customization. With frontend and backend SDKs, integrate commenting and chat into any site or application.
FEATURE_LIVE_CONVERSATIONS_DESC: Your community chats in real time on your website or application.
FEATURE_SCALABLE_DESC: Millions of pages or thousands of comments per page? It won't slow us down.
FEATURE_SSO_WEBHOOKS_DESC: Bring your own login with secure SSO, and react to every comment event with signed webhooks.
FEATURE_EFFICIENT_MODERATION_DESC: Moderate Quickly with Bulk Actions and Moderation Groups. Invite your moderators and get them to work.
FEATURE_MIGRATE_IN_MINUTES_DESC: Automated Migration from WordPress, Disqus, Commento, Muut Comments, IntenseDeba te, JustComments
FEATURE_FIGHT_SPAM_DESC: Get protected by a classifier that is continuously trained. Automatically remove unverified comments.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_DESC: Get fine grained, high level, scheduled, or immediate notifications.
FEATURE_CODE_MARKDOWN_DESC: Automatically detect, color, and format pasted code snippets.
FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_DESC: Adapts to your site - whether it has a light or a dark theme.
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_DESC: The client-side widgets and emails are fully localized in 14+ languages using browser locale detection.
FEATURE_CUSTOM_EMAIL_TEMPLATES_DESC: Emails sent to users can be customized and styled.
FEATURE_GO_INCOGNITO_DESC: Allow anonymous commenting, where an email is not required to comment.
FEATURE_INCREASE_ENGAGEMENT_DESC: FastComments decreases the time to comment, either with SSO integration or by providing a low-friction way to sign up.
FEATURE_MENTIONS_DESC: Tag users with our easy to use @mentions and they'll get notified right away.
FEATURE_HASHTAGS_DESC: Autocompleted hashtags, with the ability to pre-seed hashtags that point to external content.
FEATURE_GIFS_DESC: GIF picker with anonymized integrations with major providers.
FEATURE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_DESC: Your users stay up to date about new activity via subscriptions.
FEATURE_AWARDS_BADGES_DESC: Craft custom badges and reward your community.
FEATURE_USER_PROFILES_DESC: User Profiles complete with activity feeds and guestbook.
FEATURE_DIRECT_MESSAGING_DESC: Realtime messaging between users of your community.
FEATURE_RATINGS_REACTIONS_SURVEYS_DESC: Collect and report on reviews, reacts, and surveys.
FEATURE_ACCESS_CONTROL_DESC: Group users and limit access to comments.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_ALT_DESC: We help your community keep in touch with each other via reply, thread, and reaction notifications.
FEATURE_ANALYTICS_DESC: Built in analytics tools to monitor your site's traffic and activity at no extra cost.
FEATURE_FULL_TEXT_SEARCH_DESC: Moderators can search for comments by their text, or add search to any comment widget directly.
FEATURE_AI_AGENTS_DESC: Configure AI Agents to summarize threads, send welcome emails, moderate comments, and more.
FEATURE_LIVE_CONVERSATIONS_MODAL_INTRO: Comments appear the moment they are posted. FastComments keeps every reader on the same page over secure WebSockets, with no refresh and no polling.
FEATURE_LIVE_CONVERSATIONS_MODAL_B1: New comments, edits, votes, and pins reach every open tab and device instantly.
FEATURE_LIVE_CONVERSATIONS_MODAL_B2: New replies wait behind a "Show New Comments" button so the page never jumps, or stream in chat-style for live events and auctions.
FEATURE_LIVE_CONVERSATIONS_MODAL_B3: Each update is under 1KB on the wire, and dropped connections reconnect and resync on their own.
FEATURE_LIVE_CONVERSATIONS_MODAL_B4: Go beyond the comment box: readers can discuss highlighted text or drop chat markers directly on images.
FEATURE_SCALABLE_MODAL_INTRO: FastComments is engineered for low P99 latency on hardware most platforms would call a rounding error. We publish our sizing numbers because we are proud of them.
FEATURE_SCALABLE_MODAL_B1: A single CPU core serves around 100 comment threads per second in under 250MB of memory.
FEATURE_SCALABLE_MODAL_B2: Pagination is precomputed for every sort order, so page 500 loads as fast as page 1 on threads with thousands of comments.
FEATURE_SCALABLE_MODAL_B3: Our published sizing tables cover 100 to 1,000,000 concurrent users.
FEATURE_SCALABLE_MODAL_B4: Widgets and assets ship from a global CDN, and bulk tools handle millions of comments in a few clicks.
FEATURE_SSO_WEBHOOKS_MODAL_INTRO: Plug FastComments into your existing user base and event pipeline. Sign users in with your own auth, and get notified the instant anything changes.
FEATURE_SSO_WEBHOOKS_MODAL_B1: Secure SSO is one HMAC-SHA256 hash built server-side. No new endpoints, no libraries, with examples in Node, Java, and PHP.
FEATURE_SSO_WEBHOOKS_MODAL_B2: SAML 2.0 support works with Okta, Azure AD, and Active Directory.
FEATURE_SSO_WEBHOOKS_MODAL_B3: Webhooks fire on comment create, update, and remove, signed with HMAC and retried automatically by a queue you can watch from the admin.
FEATURE_SSO_WEBHOOKS_MODAL_B4: Existing comments migrate to your users' accounts automatically the first time they sign in.
FEATURE_EFFICIENT_MODERATION_MODAL_INTRO: Clear a queue of thousands before your coffee cools. Moderation is keyboard-driven, real-time, and built for teams.
FEATURE_EFFICIENT_MODERATION_MODAL_B1: Bulk actions select every matching comment server-side, across millions, with pause, resume, and Ctrl+Z undo.
FEATURE_EFFICIENT_MODERATION_MODAL_B2: Vim-style shortcuts: j and k to move, a to approve, s for spam, b to ban.
FEATURE_EFFICIENT_MODERATION_MODAL_B3: Moderation Groups route each moderator to just their section of the community.
FEATURE_EFFICIENT_MODERATION_MODAL_B4: Approve, mark spam, or review straight from the email digest with one-click magic links.
FEATURE_MIGRATE_IN_MINUTES_MODAL_INTRO: Switching comment systems should not be a project. Upload your export and watch it run. Most migrations finish in a couple of minutes.
FEATURE_MIGRATE_IN_MINUTES_MODAL_B1: Automated imports from Disqus, WordPress, Commento, Hyvor Talk, Muut, IntenseDebate, Just-Comments, and AnyComment.
FEATURE_MIGRATE_IN_MINUTES_MODAL_B2: Comments, replies, users, and avatars come across. Re-running an import never creates duplicates, so you can do a test pass first.
FEATURE_MIGRATE_IN_MINUTES_MODAL_B3: Import files are locked from outside access and deleted the moment the import completes.
FEATURE_MIGRATE_IN_MINUTES_MODAL_B4: Leaving is just as easy: exports and WordPress sync-back mean your data stays yours.
FEATURE_FIGHT_SPAM_MODAL_INTRO: Spam gets cheaper to send every year. FastComments answers with classifiers that learn from every moderation decision you make.
FEATURE_FIGHT_SPAM_MODAL_B1: Pick a network-wide classifier, a private model trained only on your site, or LLM-based detection.
FEATURE_FIGHT_SPAM_MODAL_B2: A per-user Trust Factor relaxes filtering for proven community members and tightens it for strangers.
FEATURE_FIGHT_SPAM_MODAL_B3: Wildcard bans for whole email domains, plus-alias detection, shadow bans, and hashed IP bans.
FEATURE_FIGHT_SPAM_MODAL_B4: Auto-approve only email-verified comments and let unverified ones expire on a timer.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_MODAL_INTRO: Bring readers back without burying them. Replies, mentions, and subscribed pages notify by email and the in-widget bell, on the schedule each user picks.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_MODAL_B1: Reply and mention emails send within a minute; page subscriptions can digest hourly or daily, per subscription.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_MODAL_B2: Empty digests are never sent, and one verification email per session keeps inboxes calm.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_MODAL_B3: Bounced and complained addresses are suppressed automatically every day.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_MODAL_B4: Every email carries one-click unsubscribe headers, and SSO sites can use their own unsubscribe links.
FEATURE_CODE_MARKDOWN_MODAL_INTRO: Paste a snippet and FastComments detects it, formats it, and highlights it, no markup required.
FEATURE_CODE_MARKDOWN_MODAL_B1: Automatic language detection with syntax highlighting for 39 languages, from Bash to TypeScript.
FEATURE_CODE_MARKDOWN_MODAL_B2: Markdown for bold, italics, quotes, lists, and code fences, plus a formatting toolbar.
FEATURE_CODE_MARKDOWN_MODAL_B3: Every comment runs through DOMPurify and sanitize-html; scripts, styles, and event handlers never survive.
FEATURE_CODE_MARKDOWN_MODAL_B4: Optional media embeds from trusted providers like YouTube, Vimeo, SoundCloud, and Spotify.
FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_MODAL_INTRO: Your comments should look native to your site, not bolted on. FastComments measures the background it sits on and themes itself to match.
FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_MODAL_B1: Dark mode triggers on actual background luminance, not just the OS setting, and swaps icons along with colors.
FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_MODAL_B2: The system font stack is the default, so the widget feels native on every device.
FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_MODAL_B3: Full custom CSS support, a no-styles mode for total control, and live theme switching without a reload.
FEATURE_ADAPTIVE_MODAL_B4: Your custom CSS is tested against every FastComments release before it ships.
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_MODAL_INTRO: Your readers see FastComments in their language before they type a word. Widgets, emails, and notifications localize automatically from the browser locale.
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_MODAL_B1: 27 locales and counting, including regional variants like Brazilian Portuguese, Traditional Chinese, and four flavors of Serbian.
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_MODAL_B2: Every string is overridable, from one button label to the entire widget.
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_MODAL_B3: Emails render in the last locale each user actually used.
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_MODAL_B4: Restrict your community to specific languages, enforced by automatic detection of each comment.
FEATURE_CUSTOM_EMAIL_TEMPLATES_MODAL_INT: Every email FastComments sends can look like it came from you, because it did. Your domain, your logo, your markup.
FEATURE_CUSTOM_EMAIL_TEMPLATES_MODAL_B1: Full EJS templating with variables and conditional logic, not just token swaps.
FEATURE_CUSTOM_EMAIL_TEMPLATES_MODAL_B2: Send from your own domain with SPF and DKIM, configured per site.
FEATURE_CUSTOM_EMAIL_TEMPLATES_MODAL_B3: Live preview with editable test data; a template that fails to render cannot be saved.
FEATURE_CUSTOM_EMAIL_TEMPLATES_MODAL_B4: Production render errors are counted per template, so silent failures are not silent.
FEATURE_GO_INCOGNITO_MODAL_INTRO: Some communities work better when nobody has to hand over an email. Turn on anonymous commenting and the email field becomes optional, or remove it entirely.
FEATURE_GO_INCOGNITO_MODAL_B1: Comments post instantly; verification is never a wall in front of the conversation.
FEATURE_GO_INCOGNITO_MODAL_B2: Cookieless verification sessions send at most one email per visit.
FEATURE_GO_INCOGNITO_MODAL_B3: Anonymous voting is a separate toggle, so you can allow reactions without signups.
FEATURE_GO_INCOGNITO_MODAL_B4: Auto-expire unverified comments after a set number of days to keep spam from piling up.
FEATURE_INCREASE_ENGAGEMENT_MODAL_INTRO: Every extra field between a reader and the comment button costs you comments. FastComments strips the signup ceremony down to almost nothing.
FEATURE_INCREASE_ENGAGEMENT_MODAL_B1: Leave an email while commenting and an account is created automatically. No password, ever: login links sign users in from their inbox.
FEATURE_INCREASE_ENGAGEMENT_MODAL_B2: Notification emails double as magic links that drop users straight back into the conversation.
FEATURE_INCREASE_ENGAGEMENT_MODAL_B3: With SSO, your logged-in users comment with zero additional steps.
FEATURE_INCREASE_ENGAGEMENT_MODAL_B4: Comment counts, recent-discussion widgets, and feeds pull readers deeper into your site.
FEATURE_MENTIONS_MODAL_INTRO: Type @ and start a name. The right person gets an email, and the conversation keeps moving.
FEATURE_MENTIONS_MODAL_B1: Autocomplete draws from commenters on the page, your site's accounts, moderators, and your SSO user directory.
FEATURE_MENTIONS_MODAL_B2: Pre-load your entire user base into autocomplete through the API.
FEATURE_MENTIONS_MODAL_B3: Scope who can be tagged with mention groups, so private cohorts stay private.
FEATURE_MENTIONS_MODAL_B4: Full keyboard navigation, and stray @ signs are detected and left alone.
FEATURE_HASHTAGS_MODAL_INTRO: Hashtags in FastComments are a navigation layer, not decoration. Every tag is a link, and you decide where it goes.
FEATURE_HASHTAGS_MODAL_B1: Autocomplete as users type, drawing community-created and API-defined tags from one dataset.
FEATURE_HASHTAGS_MODAL_B2: Point any tag at external content: a product page, a ticket, a video.
FEATURE_HASHTAGS_MODAL_B3: Clicking a tag pulls up every comment across your site that shares it.
FEATURE_HASHTAGS_MODAL_B4: Lock the taxonomy by disabling automatic tag creation, and bulk-load tags through the API.
FEATURE_GIFS_MODAL_INTRO: Reaction GIFs, minus the tracking. The built-in picker proxies every request, so the GIF provider never sees your users.
FEATURE_GIFS_MODAL_B1: Trending GIFs plus search, right in the comment area.
FEATURE_GIFS_MODAL_B2: All provider calls are anonymized: no cookies, no IP addresses shared.
FEATURE_GIFS_MODAL_B3: Content rating is configurable from G to R, with image moderation levels on top.
FEATURE_GIFS_MODAL_B4: Users can also upload .gif and .webp files up to 20MB.
FEATURE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_MODAL_INTRO: Readers who subscribe come back on their own. One click on the bell follows a page, and new activity lands in their inbox on their schedule.
FEATURE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_MODAL_B1: Per-subscription delivery: instant, hourly digest, or daily digest.
FEATURE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_MODAL_B2: If nothing happened, no email goes out.
FEATURE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_MODAL_B3: A full subscription API lets users follow anything with an ID, not just web pages.
FEATURE_SUBSCRIPTIONS_MODAL_B4: Optional RSS feeds with secure URLs you can rotate at any time.
FEATURE_JAVASCRIPT_NOT_REQUIRED_MODAL_IN: The comment widget renders as plain HTML on the server. Readers can view, post, reply, and vote with JavaScript disabled.
FEATURE_JAVASCRIPT_NOT_REQUIRED_MODAL_B1: Server-side rendering supports SSO, nested replies, pagination, sorting, and even anonymous voting.
FEATURE_JAVASCRIPT_NOT_REQUIRED_MODAL_B2: It is the same rendering engine as the JS widget, so your custom styling applies unchanged.
FEATURE_JAVASCRIPT_NOT_REQUIRED_MODAL_B3: The WordPress plugin ships the no-JS fallback by default, and our own blog runs on it.
FEATURE_JAVASCRIPT_NOT_REQUIRED_MODAL_B4: Render comments yourself with SDKs for PHP, Python, Ruby, Go, Java, Rust, Swift, Dart, C++, and Nim.
FEATURE_AWARDS_BADGES_MODAL_INTRO: Badges give your regulars a reason to stay regulars. Define the milestones and FastComments awards them automatically, even retroactively.
FEATURE_AWARDS_BADGES_MODAL_B1: Thresholds on comments, upvotes, replies, pins, and tenure, plus fun ones like Night Owl and a 40-second Fast Reply badge.
FEATURE_AWARDS_BADGES_MODAL_B2: Image badges, animated GIFs included, or styled text shown on comments and profiles.
FEATURE_AWARDS_BADGES_MODAL_B3: Stack badges, or have new ranks replace old ones as members level up.
FEATURE_AWARDS_BADGES_MODAL_B4: New badge rules re-scan your entire history, so long-time members get credit for what they already did.
FEATURE_USER_PROFILES_MODAL_INTRO: Every commenter gets a real profile: avatar, banner, bio, badges, karma, and an activity feed. It is a social layer that comes with your comments.
FEATURE_USER_PROFILES_MODAL_B1: Activity and reputation follow users across every FastComments-powered site.
FEATURE_USER_PROFILES_MODAL_B2: Profile guestbooks with four approval modes, from wide open to fully moderated.
FEATURE_USER_PROFILES_MODAL_B3: Live presence indicators and real-time updates over WebSockets.
FEATURE_USER_PROFILES_MODAL_B4: Users control their own privacy: private activity, private guestbooks, messaging off.
FEATURE_DIRECT_MESSAGING_MODAL_INTRO: Let members take it to DMs without leaving your site. Private one-on-one messaging is built in, in real time.
FEATURE_DIRECT_MESSAGING_MODAL_B1: Messages deliver instantly over WebSockets, with online presence and unread counters.
FEATURE_DIRECT_MESSAGING_MODAL_B2: Conversation history persists indefinitely across sessions and devices.
FEATURE_DIRECT_MESSAGING_MODAL_B3: Start a conversation from any comment or any profile.
FEATURE_DIRECT_MESSAGING_MODAL_B4: Users can turn messaging off or block someone entirely; admins can disable it globally.
FEATURE_RATINGS_REACTIONS_SURVEYS_MODAL_: One feedback engine, three jobs. The same configurable questions power product reviews, page reactions, and quick surveys.
Star, NPS, slider, and thumbs question types, with sub-ratings for detail.
Answering reveals a live breakdown: averages, distributions, and counts for the page.
An embeddable summary widget and a feedback analytics dashboard, included in every plan.
Configure different questions per page or per site without touching code.
FEATURE_ACCESS_CONTROL_MODAL_INTRO: Not every conversation is for everyone. Group your users and pages, and FastComments enforces who sees what, down to the mention.
FEATURE_ACCESS_CONTROL_MODAL_B1: User-level groups host separate conversations on the same page, invisible to each other.
FEATURE_ACCESS_CONTROL_MODAL_B2: Page-level groups gate whole sections, built for memberships and paywalls.
FEATURE_ACCESS_CONTROL_MODAL_B3: @mentions respect group boundaries; outsiders cannot even be tagged.
FEATURE_ACCESS_CONTROL_MODAL_B4: Require SSO to read comments at all, on the domains or pages you choose.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_ALT_MODAL_INTRO: Conversations only grow when people hear back. Reply, thread, and reaction notifications reach your community through email and the in-widget bell.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_ALT_MODAL_B1: The bell shows unread replies, upvotes, and subscribed-page activity at a glance.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_ALT_MODAL_B2: Users pick their own cadence, from instant to a daily digest, per subscription.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_ALT_MODAL_B3: Anti-fatigue by design: batching, empty-digest suppression, and per-thread opt-outs.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_ALT_MODAL_B4: SSO users carry their notification preferences in your own payload.
FEATURE_ANALYTICS_MODAL_INTRO: Know what your community is doing right now, not last week. Analytics is built in, exact, and free with every plan.
FEATURE_ANALYTICS_MODAL_B1: A live view of users online and which pages they are on, with zero delay.
FEATURE_ANALYTICS_MODAL_B2: Page loads, comments, votes, and new accounts tracked daily, never sampled.
FEATURE_ANALYTICS_MODAL_B3: When counts can be imperfect they err low. We never inflate your numbers.
FEATURE_ANALYTICS_MODAL_B4: See your projected next invoice before it bills, and forward events to Google Analytics.
FEATURE_FULL_TEXT_SEARCH_MODAL_INTRO: Find that one comment from eight months ago. Moderators get search operators; readers can get a search box right in the widget.
FEATURE_FULL_TEXT_SEARCH_MODAL_B1: Operators like user:, page:, site:, and exact= narrow millions of comments instantly.
FEATURE_FULL_TEXT_SEARCH_MODAL_B2: Fuzzy matching, exact phrases, and hashtag search across your whole account.
FEATURE_FULL_TEXT_SEARCH_MODAL_B3: One setting adds search to any comment widget, no code required.
FEATURE_FULL_TEXT_SEARCH_MODAL_B4: The same search is exposed through the API and SDKs for 10+ languages.
FEATURE_AI_AGENTS_MODAL_INTRO: AI Agents keep watch while you sleep and act with the exact permissions you grant, nothing more.
FEATURE_AI_AGENTS_MODAL_B1: 15 triggers, from first-time commenters to flag thresholds, with tools like approve, pin, warn, badge, and summarize.
FEATURE_AI_AGENTS_MODAL_B2: Every new agent starts in Dry-Run: it decides, records, and touches nothing until you are ready.
FEATURE_AI_AGENTS_MODAL_B3: Per-tool approval gates, hard budget caps, and a justification with confidence score on every action.
FEATURE_AI_AGENTS_MODAL_B4: Agents run after comments post, so readers never wait on a model.
EXCELLENCE_BATTLE_TESTED_DESC: <%- Number(usageStats.pageLoadCount).toLocaleString() %> page loads in the last year.
SCALE_DETAILED_AUDITING_DESC: Fine-grained filterable audit log with API access.
SCALE_USER_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Manage users with fine-grained control over permissions.
SCALE_GDPR_COMPLIANCE_DESC: FastComments is GDPR compliant. See our Privacy Policy for how we manage user data.
SCALE_DEVELOPMENT_SUPPORT_DESC: You won't be left in the dark with direct development, integration, and setup support.
SCALE_DATA_ENCRYPTION_DESC: Your data is stored encrypted at rest with full disk encryption.
SCALE_LIVE_BACKUPS_DESC: FastComments is backed up live across multiple regions and hosting providers 24/7.
